slides.title: Kissflow Platform Overview
slides.subtitle: Low-code enterprise platform for building custom apps, workflows, and automations
slides.notes: Introduction slide — set context for the full training session.

slides.title: What is Kissflow?
bullets: Enterprise low-code / no-code application development platform
Build workflows, forms, apps, boards, reports, and portals on one platform
Designed for citizen developers with IT governance and security controls
AI-assisted creation for forms, apps, reports, boards, and page components
Deployable on cloud with enterprise-grade compliance (GDPR, SOC 2)
Used by 195+ customers including Motorola, NBC Universal, and NielsenIQ

slides.title: Platform Vision — Build for the AI Era
bullets: Generate complete apps or individual building blocks in seconds with AI
AI works within enterprise constraints to produce deterministic results
Business users can prototype; IT governs production deployments
Fusion teams — IT leaders, developers, process owners, business users
Single platform replaces dozens of disconnected point solutions
Accelerate digital transformation without sacrificing control
slides.notes: Emphasize AI as an accelerator, not a replacement for governance.

slides.title: Core Platform Building Blocks
slides.notes: Walk through each building block — explain when to use each.

slides.title: Application Development Capability
bullets: Create fully functional apps with visual tools and optional scripting
Compose pages from processes, dataforms, boards, reports, and datasets
Role-based navigation and page-level permissions
Custom page components with JavaScript and AI generation
Embed workflows directly inside application pages
Publish apps to specific user groups or the entire organization

slides.title: Workflow Automation Capability
bullets: Design sequential, parallel, and conditional workflow steps
Assign participants by user, role, group, or dynamic rules
Configure approve, reject, send back, and delegate actions
SLA timers and escalation rules for overdue items
Email, in-app, and mobile push notifications
Full audit trail of every action on every process item

slides.title: Case Management Capability
bullets: Kanban-style boards for tickets, cases, and work items
Customizable columns, fields, views, and assignment rules
SLA tracking with visual indicators for overdue items
Link boards to processes for escalation and approval flows
Bulk actions and quick filters for high-volume operations
Ideal for IT helpdesk, HR requests, and customer support

slides.title: What Makes Kissflow Different
bullets: Proven 451% ROI — Nucleus Research case study (SN Aboitiz Power Group)
Payback achieved in 2.8 months with multi-app deployment
Simple AND sophisticated — quick automations to end-to-end solutions
Mature governance: data policies, app monitoring, audit logs
Affordable professional services for complex app delivery
Customers run hundreds of custom solutions on a single platform
slides.notes: Use customer stories — Puma, SN Aboitiz, Valantic, CaratLane.

slides.title: Enterprise Application Templates
slides.notes: Show App Store templates available out of the box.

slides.title: Industry Solutions
bullets: Oil & Gas — ESG compliance, permit to work, reservoir management, safety
Retail — store opening, franchise renewals, vendor portal, spend management
Manufacturing — production tracking, supplier performance, quality inspection
Healthcare, BFSI, Insurance, FMCG, and Energy verticals supported
Templates accelerate time-to-value — customize to your processes
McDermott, CaratLane, Olympus as reference customers

slides.title: Governance & Security Modules
slides.notes: IT leaders care about this — spend adequate time here.

slides.title: Kissflow Plans Overview
bullets: Basic plan — core processes, apps, boards, and standard integrations
Enterprise plan — portals, connector builder, advanced governance, backup
Feature availability varies by plan (noted in Community documentation)
Contact sales for plan comparison and enterprise requirements
Trial and demo environments available for evaluation
Upgrade path as organizational adoption grows
slides.notes: Reference plan badges in community articles (Basic vs Enterprise).
